_comment: Versioned-pin manifest for az-ai-v2 v2.0.0. Install with `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai-v2@2.0.0`. Frozen at v2.0.0 — SHA256 below is the digest of the v2.0.0 GitHub Release artifact and never changes once filled at tag time. No checkver/autoupdate on versioned manifests by design.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI v2 — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator (pinned to v2.0.0)
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai-v2 v2.0.0 (pinned) installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
